shelfmark: AIU VII.D.38 + AIU VII.D.66 + AIU VII.D.65
library: כיא פריז · כיא פריז · כיא פריז
description: Legal document from Cairo, dated 1730 CE (8 Heshvan 5491 AM), involving the partners Moshe ʿAzarya and Yosef Benṭora/Binṭora(?) and a debt of 16,495 diwani medins. A Muslim named al-Amīr ʿAbd al-Raḥmān Ağa, of Cairo's Circassian regiment (ג'ראכשה), is also involved with the partners in the çuhacılık/clothing sales trade. For an explanation of this Ottoman Turkish term, see: Bodl. MS heb. c 27/87 (PGPID 19319). ASE/MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
